items.title: Quantum-safe bitcoin now possible without a soft fork, but costs $200 a pop, new research shows
items.summary: A new scheme from a StarkWare researcher works under existing consensus rules, offering an emergency fallback while BIP-360 awaits activation.

items.title: x402 protocol adds usage-based pricing for AI compute requests
items.summary: The upgrade from flat fees to variable pricing is designed to support the use of AI agents for LLM inference, compute and data queries.

items.title: Bitcoin can be made quantum-safe without a protocol upgrade: Researcher
items.summary: However, it could cost users between $75 and $150 per transaction in GPU computing power, limiting its practical use.

items.title: TON blockchain claims sub-second finality with Catchain 2.0 upgrade
items.summary: Transactions on the Open Network layer-1 blockchain protocol previously took about 10 seconds to settle before the Catchain 2.0 consensus upgrade.

items.title: UK-led Operation Atlantic freezes $12M tied to crypto scams
items.summary: Operation Atlantic, a joint US, UK and Canadian operation, froze more than $12 million tied to crypto approval phishing scams and identified over 20,000 victims.

items.title: Mutation testing for the agentic era
items.summary: Code coverage is one of the most dangerous quality metrics in software testing. Many developers fail to realize that code coverage lies by omission: it measures execution, not verification. Test suites with high coverage can obfuscate the fact that critical functionality is untes

items.title: Try our new dimensional analysis Claude plugin
items.summary: We’re releasing a new Claude plugin for developing and auditing code that implements dimensional analysis, a technique we explored in our most recent blog post. Most LLM-based security skills ask the model to find bugs. Our new dimensional-analysis plugin for Claude Code takes a

items.title: Spotting issues in DeFi with dimensional analysis
items.summary: Using dimensional analysis, you can categorically rule out a whole category of logic and arithmetic bugs that plague DeFi formulas. No code changes required, just better reasoning! One of the first lessons in physics is learning to think in terms of dimensions. Physicists can oft

items.title: Japan approves bill to classify crypto as financial instruments
items.summary: The Japanese Cabinet reclassified crypto as a financial instrument and will enforce insider trading bans and annual disclosure mandates for issuers.

items.title: Banks are treading carefully on stablecoins despite market growth, S&P Global says
items.summary: Most U.S. lenders remain in a wait-and-see mode as deposit risks, regulatory shifts and new competition complicate strategy, according to the report.

items.title: Bitcoin rally extends toward $73K despite concerning US economic data
items.summary: Bitcoin continues to show strength even as US recession risks rise and the fragile ceasefire with Iran begins to show cracks.

items.title: Crypto exchanges chase TradFi commodities market as pricing gaps persist
items.summary: Crypto exchanges are seeking market share of TradFi trading venues, but tokenized commodities adoption is limited by pricing and liquidity concerns.

items.title: XRP may be less exposed to quantum computer threats than bitcoin, experts say
items.summary: XRP’s design leaves a smaller share of its supply exposed to future quantum attacks than Bitcoin’s, experts said, pointing to additional XRPL features that stand out.

items.title: XRP edges higher to $1.35 on breakout, but bullish momentum still lacks
items.summary: Strong volume pushed price above $1.34, though weak fundamentals and overhead resistance continue to cap follow-through.

items.title: ETH, SOL, DOGE slide as Bitcoin fails to break $73,000 for the third time since the ceasefire
items.summary: The level that has capped every rally during the six-week war remains intact, with analysts saying $75,000 needs to break before the market enters a genuine bullish phase.

items.title: OKX and HashKey invest in new Vietnam exchange ahead of crypto licensing push
items.summary: The partnership will help the exchange meet Vietnam's $380 million capital requirement to enter a government pilot program aimed at licensing local platforms and curbing offshore trading.

items.title: Mythos AI threat prompts Bessent, Powell to convene bank CEOs for urgent talks
items.summary: Mythos can rapidly spot software flaws and craft sophisticated exploits, raising fears of systemic risks in the banking system.

items.title: CZ hopes in 5 years people stop talking about crypto and just use it
items.summary: Some industry insiders speculate the crypto sector may be just one market cycle away from full-scale mainstream adoption.

items.title: BlackRock’s Bitcoin ETF inflows $269M, marking a 5-week high
items.summary: Fidelity and Morgan Stanley’s Bitcoin ETFs also saw a combined $68.2 million in inflows, while four other Bitcoin ETFs also tallied inflows on Thursday.

items.title: Elon Musk’s xAI sues Colorado arguing its AI rules restrict speech
items.summary: The AI company argued that such rules would force it to feed its AI chatbot Grok with data aligned with Colorado’s political views rather than striving to be “maximally truth seeking.”
